历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11219 → 12310 → 13380 → 14802 → 16253, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 5034 places and an average annual shift of about 1258 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 16253, with a clear backward trend; the enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2026 are 75, 76, 74, 76, 76, 76 respectively, stable at 76 in the last 4 years, with 2026 unchanged from 2025, no expansion or contraction, and the competition base remains unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 84th, with rankings stable in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; North China Electric Power University (Baoding) has a stable reputation in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its comprehensive popularity on the Douyin platform has not entered the national top 100, with general short video exposure, and the level of application attention is moderate; the Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A (top in the country), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, with distinctive characteristics in the power industry, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science continue to be highly recommended and popular in society, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines, driving up competition in related major groups; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province college entrance examination is about 267,900, an increase of about 15,552 compared to 2025 (about 252,348), an increase of about 6.2%; based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 76%, the number of Physics Category candidates increases by about 11,700, intensifying competition; in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 441 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 520 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a university within Fujian Province, with no local student preference; Fujian candidates applying to out-of-province 211 universities need to consider regional preferences comprehensively; North China Electric Power University (Baoding) has a stable enrollment plan in Fujian, with a neutral regional factor impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province (about +6%) leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high popularity of electrical advantageous disciplines attracting applications, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 16253; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16453, with a range of 15953–16953.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with humanities and social sciences being relatively non-dominant among science and engineering institutions; North China Electric Power University (Baoding) has maintained a stable reputation in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; overall popularity on Douyin platform is average, with moderate application attention; the university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), which have no direct disciplinary mapping to History Category majors (Law, Administrative Management, Social Work, Foreign Languages and Literature), resulting in weak disciplinary support.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuation but overall backward trend in History Category rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in Fujian History Category examinees (about +6%) leading to slightly intensified competition, and the weak disciplinary support from the university's advantageous disciplines for History Category majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 3319; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3399, with a range of 2899–3899.
